name: Fort Pena Colorado Park
description: Fort Pena Colorado Park is a place to play pickleball in Marathon, TX. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. Tape lines have been laid, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Terlingua Ghost Town
description: Nice pickleball court located in the beautiful Ghost town of Terlingua, Texas right in the middle of the desert located near Big Bend National Park.
